title: Ali Baba and the Forty Thieves: The Lost Scimitar of Arabia
original_title: Ali Baba and the Forty Thieves: The Lost Scimitar of Arabia
overview: In a land far away and full of ancient marvels, the battles of the young prince Ali, fighting for the succession of his land and the freedom of his people, take place at the hands of a terrible tyrant.
